headline: How To Earn $500 A Month From JM Smucker Stock Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
summary: JM Smucker has an annual dividend yield of 4.25% ($4.40 a year). Investors can exploit its dividend yield to pocket a regular $500 monthly.

headline: J. M. Smucker Earnings: What To Look For From SJM
